title: toh glyphs
description: this mod adds glyphs from the owl house and more
body:
this mod adds five of the glyphs from the owl house, fire glyph, ice glyph, plant glyph, light glyph and invisibility glyph

 

the fire glyph let you shoot a fire ball

 

the ice glyph lest you make a wall of ice

 

the plant glyph works like infinite bone meal

 

the light glyph lets you light up areas without torches

 

the invisibility glyph lets you go invisible

 

 

a new item this mod adds it magic, magic is necessary to craft the glyphs 

 

comment anything you think i should  add it i might add it

 

Update 1:

 

-added new hover glyph that when right clicked gives you two seconds of levitation and has a five second cooldown

-added a five second cooldown to the fire and ice glyphs

-fixed a bug that made the ice glyph break blocks

-changed the invisibility glyph to be purple instead of black

-changed the fire glyph to spawn fire in front of you
 
Update 2:

Added combo glyphs 

Update 3: 

1.19 now WOW 

Update 4: 

it has been a bit since the last update bit this is a pretty big one

-added portal door item

-added isles biome

-added boiling isles dimension

-added blood house structure

-added titan blood item

-added glyph magic item

-added empty ore

-added fire, ice, invisibility, plant and light gems

-added paper versions of each of the glyphs

-added fire gem tool set
 
that is all of the major things added in this update, there might be a few changes here and there but that's mostly it, i would just like to expand on some of the things that i mentioned, 1 the blood house structure will be found in the boling isles dimension, 2 the portal door will let you go to the new dimension which it where you will find the empty ore, 3 the empty ore will be combined with glyphs to make the different gems, i plan on adding tool sets for the other gems but i only have fire done now, 4 the titan blood will be found in the blood house structure, 5 the paper glyphs are easier to craft versions of the glyphs but will only have one use(as i write this i just realised that this is how they work in the show so these are actually more accurate to the real ones lol), 6 last thing i want to cover it the glyph magic item, it will allow you to use all the different types of glyphs with no cooldown. 

Update 4.1:
 
OK so i accidentally didn't have a recipe for the glyph magic, so that is all i added, this is by far the smallest and quickest update this mod will ever get lol

any version before 4.1 can be found at curseforge
